siteMetadata.title: Ricky Dodd (sometimes) Thinks
siteMetadata.description: A simple, minimalistic blog to catalogue the thoughts and beliefs of Ricky Dodd. Anything blogged represents the thoughts and beliefs of Ricky Dodd, and nothing blogged represents the thoughts or beliefs of any person (or entity) that associates with Ricky Dodd in a professional or private context.

posts.excerpt: This is the second blog post submitted. Again, subject to removal and intended for testing only.
This is the first blog post submitted. This post is subject to removal after some testing.
